tasks.title: Enhance init with broader tech stack detection

goals.description: Add detection for: Ruby (Gemfile), PHP (composer.json), .NET (*.csproj), Swift (Package.swift), Flutter (pubspec.yaml)
Detect monorepo structures (lerna.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, nx.json)
Read and parse existing README.md for project description if no package.json description

During init, create .github/hooks/hooks.json with project-specific hook config
Copy agent hook scripts to .github/hooks/ (project-level, committed to git)
Update agent-init SKILL.md with project hooks generation step
Create agent-events/SKILL.md skill for querying events.db: recent events, events by agent, events by task, tool usage stats
Add event summary to agent-switch status panel (recent activity count per agent)
Add event cleanup command: purge events older than N days

tasks.title: Automatic memory capture on stage transitions
tasks.description: Agent 完成阶段(FSM 状态转移)时自动保存记忆快照，无需手动调用。从本轮工作中提取：关键决策、修改的文件、遇到的问题、交接要点。

goals.description: Post-tool-use hook detects FSM state transition (status change in task-board.json) and triggers memory save
Memory snapshot auto-extracts: summary, decisions, files_modified, issues_encountered, handoff_notes from current agent context
agent-memory SKILL.md updated with "auto-capture" section documenting the trigger mechanism and data extraction format
No manual "save memory" call required — fully automatic on stage completion

tasks.title: Smart memory loading by downstream agent role
tasks.description: 下游 Agent 启动时只加载它需要的记忆字段，按角色差异化。减少 token 消耗，增加有效信息密度。

goals.description: agent-switch loads memory automatically when switching to agent with assigned task
Role-based field selection: Designer→Implementer loads decisions+artifacts+handoff_notes; Implementer→Reviewer loads files_modified+decisions; Reviewer→Tester loads files_modified+review issues
Memory loaded as concise summary (not raw JSON dump) — formatted for human readability in agent context
agent-memory SKILL.md and agent-switch SKILL.md updated with smart loading documentation

tasks.title: ASCII pipeline visualization in agent status
tasks.description: /agent status 输出包含 ASCII 流水线图，展示每个任务当前在哪个阶段，哪些已完成。

goals.description: agent-switch status panel includes ASCII pipeline diagram showing 5 stages with current position marker
Each task shows: stage name, emoji, status (✅ done / ⏳ active / ⏸️ pending)
Multiple in-flight tasks each get their own pipeline line
agent-switch SKILL.md updated with pipeline visualization spec

tasks.title: Enhance implementer with TDD discipline and verification loop
tasks.description: 融合 ECC 最佳实践到 agent-implementer：严格 TDD 红绿重构 + git checkpoint + 80% 覆盖率门槛 + 构建增量修复 + 提交前 verification loop

goals.description: agent-implementer SKILL.md TDD section enhanced: mandatory git checkpoint at RED/GREEN/REFACTOR, 80%+ coverage gate before submitting to review
New "Build Fix" workflow in agent-implementer: fix one error at a time, re-run build after each fix, track progress count
New "Pre-Review Verification" checklist in agent-implementer: typecheck → build → lint → test → security scan must all pass before FSM transition to reviewing

tasks.title: Enhance reviewer with structured severity and security checklist
tasks.description: 融合 ECC 审查实践到 agent-reviewer：置信度过滤 + CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW 严重级别 + OWASP Top 10 安全清单 + 代码质量阈值

goals.description: agent-reviewer SKILL.md adds severity levels (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) with approval rules: CRITICAL→BLOCK, HIGH→REQUEST_CHANGES, MEDIUM+LOW→APPROVE with notes
Security review checklist added: hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, path traversal, auth bypass, insecure deps, secrets in logs
Code quality thresholds added: function >50 lines, file >800 lines, nesting >4 levels, console.log/TODO without ticket — all flagged as warnings
Confidence-based filtering: only report issues with >=80% confidence, skip stylistic/formatting noise

tasks.title: Enhance tester with coverage analysis and flaky detection
tasks.description: 融合 ECC 测试实践到 agent-tester：覆盖率分析 + flaky 检测隔离 + E2E POM 模式 + 失败截图

goals.description: agent-tester SKILL.md adds coverage analysis workflow: detect test framework → run coverage → parse report → identify uncovered high-priority areas
Flaky test detection: suspect tests re-run 3-5x, flagged as flaky if inconsistent, quarantined with test.fixme()
E2E testing section added: Page Object Model pattern, data-testid selectors, screenshot/video on failure, Playwright best practices

tasks.title: Add ADR format to designer and user story format to acceptor
tasks.description: 设计者增加 ADR 格式（决策+替代方案+理由），验收者增加用户旅程格式（As a... I want... so that...）

goals.description: agent-designer SKILL.md design doc template adds ADR section: Decision, Context, Alternatives Considered, Rationale, Consequences
agent-designer adds goal coverage self-check: verify every goal has corresponding design section before completing
agent-acceptor SKILL.md adds user story format guidance: "As a [role], I want [action], so that [benefit]" for goals

tasks.title: Project-level living documents maintained by each agent
tasks.description: 项目级活文档体系：docs/ 下维护 6 个项目级文档（需求/设计/测试/实现/审阅/验收），每个 Agent 在完成任务后更新自己负责的文档，追加本次任务的内容，反映项目整体最新状态。

goals.description: Define 6 project-level doc templates in docs/: requirement.md (Acceptor), design.md (Designer), test-spec.md (Tester), implementation.md (Implementer), review.md (Reviewer), acceptance.md (Acceptor) — each with standard structure and changelog section
All 5 agent SKILL.md files updated: each agent must append to their doc after completing a task stage, documenting what was done for that task
Documents are cumulative — each task adds a new section (## T-NNN: title) rather than overwriting, so the doc reflects full project history
Tester reads requirement.md + design.md as input when writing test-spec.md entries
agent-init creates initial empty doc templates in docs/ during project initialization

tasks.title: Structured messaging with types, replay, and priority
tasks.description: MSG-1+MSG-2+MSG-3: 结构化消息类型(type/severity/file/line) + 消息链路回放(/inbox --history) + 优先级(urgent/normal/info)

goals.description: agent-messaging SKILL.md defines structured message schema with type, severity, file, line, related_goal fields and 6 message type enums
agent-messaging SKILL.md adds message replay feature: /inbox --history T-NNN shows chronological collaboration timeline with emoji+timestamp
agent-messaging SKILL.md adds priority levels (urgent/normal/info) with sorting behavior

tasks.title: Cycle time metrics and enhanced staleness detection
tasks.description: F-2+F-3: 每阶段停留时间 + 平均 cycle time + 按阶段差异化超时提醒

goals.description: agent-switch status panel includes cycle time per task: time spent in each stage (from memory timestamps)
agent-switch status panel shows average cycle time across completed tasks
agent-staleness-check or agent-switch documents per-stage timeout thresholds: designing>1h, implementing>4h, reviewing>2h, testing>2h

tasks.title: Enhanced task board with grouping, stats, and progress
tasks.description: B-1+B-2+B-3: 看板分组视图 + 项目统计面板 + 任务进度追踪

goals.description: agent-task-board SKILL.md defines grouped view output: blocked/in-progress/completed sections with emoji headers
agent-task-board SKILL.md adds project stats panel: total tasks, completion rate, average cycle time, slowest stage, weekly throughput
agent-task-board SKILL.md adds progress tracking: auto-calculate percentage from goals done count (3/5 = 60%) with progress bar

tasks.title: Project-level memory for cross-task knowledge

goals.description: agent-memory SKILL.md defines project-memory.json format: tech_stack, architecture_decisions, lessons_learned, hot_files sections
agent-memory SKILL.md documents how project memory is updated (append after each task completion) and loaded (summary on agent startup)

tasks.title: Core pipeline test suite

goals.description: tests/run-all.sh created as test runner
tests/test-skills.sh validates all 12 SKILL.md files have correct YAML frontmatter (name + description)
tests/test-agents.sh validates all 5 agent.md files exist and have frontmatter
tests/test-hooks.sh validates all hook scripts are executable and have correct shebang
MEMORY.md long-term memory file per agent role defined in agent-memory SKILL.md
memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md diary format with 30-90 day lifecycle defined
PROJECT_MEMORY.md cross-role shared memory schema defined
Memory directory structure (.agents/memory/{role}/) documented
scripts/memory-index.sh created: indexes all .md memory files into SQLite FTS5
Index auto-rebuilds on file change (1.5s debounce documented)
Chinese text support via unicode61 tokenizer
scripts/memory-search.sh created: keyword search with Top-6 results
Citation format: [file:line] context snippet
Optional vector search documented (70/30 keyword/vector weight)
Auto-flush before compaction documented in agent-memory SKILL.md
Temporal decay: 30-day half-life scoring algorithm defined
Auto-promotion: 6-signal scoring (frequency/relevance/diversity/recency/consolidation/richness)
Promotion threshold: minScore>=0.8, minRecallCount>=3, minUniqueQueries>=3
hooks/agent-before-switch.sh and hooks/agent-after-switch.sh created
hooks/agent-before-task-create.sh and hooks/agent-after-task-status.sh created
hooks/agent-before-memory-write.sh and hooks/agent-after-memory-write.sh created
hooks/agent-before-compaction.sh and hooks/agent-on-goal-verified.sh created
Block semantics: hook returns {block:true,reason:...} to stop operation
Approval semantics: hook returns {requireApproval:true} to pause for confirmation
Priority chain: hooks execute by priority field, terminal on block
Tool profiles defined: coding/review/testing/accept with allow/deny lists
Per-role restrictions: Reviewer read-only, Tester no src/ edit, etc.
hooks.json updated with new hook entries
scripts/cron-scheduler.sh created with crontab-style scheduling
.agents/jobs.json schema defined with schedule/action/description
Staleness auto-wake: checks stale tasks and activates corresponding agent
Daily summary generation job defined
Webhook endpoint spec documented: POST /hooks/wake with bearer auth

CI callback: build/test results trigger Tester or Implementer
agent-switch SKILL.md defines auto-advance: agent completes → auto switch to next role
Blocking detection: threshold timeout triggers escalation or skip
Heartbeat check: periodic agent health verification documented
Token budget allocation per source defined in agent-memory SKILL.md
Role-aware injection: different agents get different context mix
Smart compression: preserve decisions, compress discussions
Agent switch auto-injects: global SKILL + project SKILL + task goals + memory Top-6
Dynamic system prompt: adapts based on current task phase
Upstream handoff message included in bootstrap
Subagent spawn documented: fork sub-agent for parallel tasks
Multi-implementer: different tasks assigned to different sub-agents
Parallel review: multiple reviewers on different files

tasks.title: Add E2E test for 3-Phase FSM validation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive E2E tests that validate the 3-Phase Closed Loop FSM: dual-mode transition rules, convergence gate, feedback loop counting, and auto-block at MAX_FEEDBACK_LOOPS=10.

goals.description: Test all 26 legal 3-Phase transitions succeed
Test illegal transitions are blocked by hook
Test convergence gate blocks device_baseline when tracks incomplete
Test feedback loop counter increments correctly
Test auto-block at feedback_loops >= 10

tasks.title: Inject ask-next-step rule in agent-init
tasks.description: When agent-init initializes a project, inject into the project guidance file: '你的每一次回复最后都需要询问我的下一步计划，下一步计划的内容需要和当前 agent 的角色一致'. Ensures every agent response ends with a role-appropriate next-step question.

goals.description: agent-init appends ask-next-step rule to project guidance (.github/copilot-instructions.md or .agents/rules/)
Rule text includes role-awareness: next-step question must match current agent role
Existing projects are not affected (rule only added on fresh init)

tasks.title: Unify 3-phase into agent workflow
tasks.description: Merge the existing 3-Phase Engineering Closed Loop into the unified 5-agent workflow. No separate '3-phase' process — one flow: acceptor→designer→implementer→reviewer→tester→acceptor. Remove workflow_mode choice from agent-init.

goals.description: agent-orchestrator drives the unified 5-agent flow without separate 3-phase mode
agent-init no longer asks 'Simple or 3-Phase' — unified by default
Existing 3-phase FSM states gracefully migrate to unified flow
Task schema no longer requires workflow_mode field

tasks.title: DFMEA template + implementer integration
tasks.description: Create DFMEA (Design Failure Mode and Effects Analysis) template. Implementer must output DFMEA document before submitting to review. Fields: component, potential failure mode, effect, severity(1-10), occurrence(1-10), detection(1-10), RPN, recommended action.

goals.description: DFMEA markdown template exists in .agents/templates/dfmea.md
Implementer skill references DFMEA as mandatory output before review
DFMEA includes: component, failure mode, effect, severity, occurrence, detection, RPN, action
Hook or skill validation ensures DFMEA exists before status transition to reviewing

tasks.title: Human-in-the-loop review gate (core)
tasks.description: Each phase output requires human interaction before proceeding. Agent publishes document → human reviews/comments on interactive page → agent collects feedback → modifies → repeat until human approves. All 5 agents need this approval gate.

goals.description: Core HITL gate mechanism: agent can publish doc, poll for approval, collect feedback
Gate blocks FSM transition until human approval received
Feedback loop: agent modifies doc based on comments, re-publishes
All 5 agents (acceptor/designer/implementer/reviewer/tester) have the gate integrated
Platform selection is configurable per-project (asked during init or first use)

tasks.title: Interactive page adapters (Confluence/HTML/GitHub)
tasks.description: Platform adapters for HITL review pages. Support Confluence (API), local HTML (browser-openable), and GitHub Issues/PR as review surfaces. Platform chosen per-project during agent-init or on first task.

goals.description: Local HTML adapter: generates interactive HTML with comment form + approve button
Confluence adapter: publishes page via API, reads comments
GitHub adapter: creates Issue or PR comment for review
Adapter interface is pluggable — easy to add new platforms
agent-init asks user which platform to use for HITL review

tasks.title: Worktree prompt in acceptor workflow
tasks.description: When acceptor receives a new feature request, ask user: '是否在新的 worktree 中进行？' If yes, create worktree via agent-worktree skill before task creation.

goals.description: Acceptor skill prompts user about worktree for new feature tasks
If yes, creates worktree with task-specific branch before publishing task
Task record includes worktree path for downstream agents

tasks.title: Role mismatch detection + switch prompt
tasks.description: When user asks current agent to do something outside its scope, detect the mismatch and prompt: '这个任务更适合 <target-role>，是否切换？' If user confirms, auto-switch. All agents need this detection.

goals.description: Each agent skill defines its scope boundaries (what's in/out)
Detection logic maps out-of-scope requests to target agent
Prompt shows target role suggestion with one-click switch
User can decline switch and stay in current role
